Chronic Conditions Warehouse Virtual Research Data Center 
T-MSIS TAF Annual Provider RIFs Codebook │ December 2025 │ V 1.3 19 

CCW_APR_LINK_KEY 

LABEL: CCW Key to Link APR base Record to Related Supplement Records 

DESCRIPTION: CCW Key to Link annual provider (APR) base Record to Corresponding Supplement Records. 

SHORT NAME: CCW_APR_LINK_KEY 

LONG NAME: CCW_APR_LINK_KEY 

TYPE: NUM 

LENGTH: 15 

FILE(S): All APR files 

SOURCE: CCW (derived) 

VALUES: Alphanumeric character string
